scenes.description: Performance of 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' by Hakos Baelz, Kobo Kanaeru, Astel Leda, and Kageyama Shien.
Transition between songs. Lights dim, applause from the audience.
Performance of 'V' by Hakos Baelz with backup dancers.
